ignoreCommand: bash -lc 'if [ -z "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" ]; then echo "VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA missing; forcing build"; exit 1; fi; CHANGED_FILES=$(git diff --name-only "$VERCEL_GIT_PREVIOUS_SHA" HEAD 2>/dev/null || true); if [ -z "$CHANGED_FILES" ]; then echo "No changed files detected; forcing build"; exit 1; fi; if echo "$CHANGED_FILES" | grep -qv "^paperclip/"; then echo "Non-paperclip changes detected; running build"; exit 1; fi; echo "Only paperclip/ changes detected; skipping build"; exit 0'
